text.message: I blocked robbed the last chance
i will steal oj if not
you are getting a free game though

4th rob oj do you have any problem?
if the 3s and 4s role then im set
if not then its pretty hard
I have no port, no wood, barely any sheep
I’m not being “handed” the game. That was a falsehood
Red or black take army. I don’t even take army.
I don’t understand this emphasis on me I’m at 4 no devs
i guess im not the focus anymore xd
You focused me though. That was weird
from now on im capped, can't build more sets
Blue u still have easy path to win
You don’t need to get army
It’s the right block for blue
You guys want me with army
well, red takes army and road
Red is target but blue can’t be forgotten
You guys are bad at this game
domt say that when you robbed me 4 in a row in early game giving red a free snowball
